info.name: QuicForge API
info.description: GraphQL (queries, mutation, subscription) + operational endpoints for QuicForge, a QUIC round-trip latency lab. Set the `baseUrl` collection variable (default http://localhost:8080). Start the server with `quicforge-node serve`.

graphql.query:
mutation Start($input: BenchParamsInput!) {
  startBenchmark(input: $input) {
    id
    target
    connections
    requestsPerConnection
    totalRequests
    state
    completed
    failureReason
    stats {
      samples
      minNs
      meanNs
      p50Ns
      p90Ns
      p99Ns
      p999Ns
      maxNs
      p50Micros
      p99Micros
      p999Micros
    }
    throughput {
      requestsPerSec
      bytesPerSec
      megabitsPerSec
    }
    startedAt
    finishedAt
  }
}

request.description: GraphQL subscription over WebSocket at /graphql/ws (graphql-transport-ws). Postman's GraphQL WS support or a tool like `websocat` can be used to observe Started/Progress/Completed/Failed events while a benchmark runs.
